document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Nevada Project in Nevada, United States dated June 2016.pdf
document.description: This report serves as a status update for the Lithium Nevada project, providing NI 43-101 compliant resource statements for the Stage I and Stage II deposits, and includes updated advancements in the metallurgical process.
